summary: Completed testing of Push Notifications and Team Management features (Iteration 11). All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified: Team CRUD, invite members, push notifications toggle in Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API
Push notifications require browser permission and service worker - tested toggle UI, actual push delivery depends on browser support
seed_data_creation: Test teams created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested Push Notifications and Team Management features. All backend endpoints working: GET /api/push/vapid-key (returns VAPID public key), POST /api/push/subscribe (stores subscription), POST /api/push/unsubscribe (removes subscription), POST /api/push/send (sends push notification). Team endpoints: POST /api/teams (creates team), GET /api/teams (returns user's team), POST /api/teams/invite (adds member with email notification), DELETE /api/teams/members/{id} (removes member), GET /api/teams/timesheets (returns team timesheets), DELETE /api/teams (deletes team). Frontend: Team page shows create form when no team exists, after creating shows member list with owner badge, invite form visible for owner with email/role fields, Settings page has Push Notifications toggle. Team is a paid feature (TierGatedRoute). VAPID keys configured in both backend/.env and frontend/.env.

backend_team_management: GET /api/teams returns null when no team exists
GET /api/teams returns user's team after creation
POST /api/teams/invite returns 404 if user has no team
GET /api/teams/timesheets returns 404 if user has no team
DELETE /api/teams returns 404 if no team exists
backend_auth_regression: Login with test user credentials works
frontend_team_page: Create team form visible when no team exists (data-testid='team-name-input', 'create-team-btn')
After creating team, shows member list with owner badge
Invite flow works - member added with role and pending status
Team stats show correct counts (Total Members, Active, Pending Invites)
Delete team works - returns to create form
frontend_navigation: Team nav item visible in sidebar (data-testid='nav-team')
Auth flow regression - login still works

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
